description_long: This is a medium-sized, partially melted pink candle with intricate white floral lace patterns embossed around its cylindrical surface. The candle's top edge is uneven and irregular, suggesting it has been used, with a hollowed center but no visible wick. The floral lace design wraps continuously around the candle, giving it a decorative and elegant appearance. The candle sits on a dark, round base that appears to be made of a different material, possibly ceramic or painted metal, providing stability and contrast. The surface of the candle is matte with a slightly rough texture due to the raised lace pattern. This decorative candle would be suitable for display in urban outdoor or semi-outdoor settings such as patios, sidewalk cafes, or park tables.
description: A pink, partially melted candle with raised white floral lace patterns, set on a dark round base. The candle has an uneven top and a decorative, textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the most prominent large floral lace pattern and the deepest melted section at the top edge.
description_view_1: This side highlights a different section of the lace pattern, with more visible small flowers and a less pronounced melted edge.
description_view_2: Another angle of the main floral motif, with the lace pattern wrapping around and the candle's hollow center visible.
description_view_3: This view displays a cluster of smaller lace flowers and a relatively even melted rim, with the base clearly visible.
